sys_ui_message.key: Tasker - Group Management for Tasker can only be configured from the [Tasker] application scope You must change the application scope to [Tasker] to change the Group Management settings.
sys_ui_message.message: Group Management for Tasker can only be configured from the [Tasker] application scope You must change the application scope to [Tasker] to change the Group Management settings.
sys_ui_message.sys_name: Tasker - Group Management for Tasker can only be configured from the [Tasker] application scope You must change the application scope to [Tasker] to change the Group Management settings.
